query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Sharing Your Faith'), 'According to Romans 1:16, why should we not be ashamed of the gospel?', 'multiple_choice', '["It makes us popular", "It is the power of God for salvation", "It proves we are smart", "It earns us rewards"]', 'It is the power of God for salvation', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Sharing Your Faith'), 'What does 1 Peter 3:15 instruct us to do when sharing our faith?', 'multiple_choice', '["Argue forcefully with unbelievers", "Always be prepared to give an answer with gentleness and respect", "Only share with people who ask", "Wait for the perfect moment"]', 'Always be prepared to give an answer with gentleness and respect', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Sharing Your Faith'), 'A personal testimony should be structured in three parts: life before Christ, coming to faith, and life after Christ.', 'true_false', '["True", "False"]', 'True', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Sharing Your Faith'), 'Which of the following is the MOST important foundation for effective evangelism?', 'multiple_choice', '["Having all the answers to theological questions", "Living an authentic Christian life", "Memorizing scripture verses", "Attending evangelism training"]', 'Living an authentic Christian life', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM lessons WHERE title = 'Sharing Your Faith'), 'What should you do after someone accepts Christ?', 'multiple_choice', '["Leave them alone to figure things out", "Connect them with a church community and provide follow-up", "Give them a Bible and move on", "Wait for them to contact you"]', 'Connect them with a church community and provide follow-up', 5, NOW(), NOW());
